visual_description: A close-up shot focuses on a man with dark hair and a mustache, his face illuminated by a cool, greenish light. He wears a dark shirt and has a serious, intense expression as he looks slightly off-camera to his left. In the foreground, the back of another person's head with short, graying hair is visible. The background is dark and out of focus, showing what appears to be a window with bars. In the top left corner, white Chinese characters read "风行网". The camera remains steady, capturing the man's somber demeanor. The audio is filled with a slow, somber, and melancholic instrumental piece. A low, resonant, and slightly dissonant melody, possibly from a string instrument, creates a tense and serious atmosphere. The music is atmospheric and suspenseful, building a sense of quiet gravity and anticipation, as if leading up to a significant and somber moment. There is no dialogue or other sound effects, allowing the music to dominate the soundscape. The camera cuts to a close-up of the second man, who has short, graying hair. He looks up and to his right with a worried and concerned expression, his eyes wide. The same greenish lighting and dark, out-of-focus background
